description: B&W editorial close-up, subject's hand near face with pearl necklace. Soft single key from camera-left creates a small loop or a rembrandt-style cheek triangle depending on whether the cheek shadow is read as connected. Two credible classical reads, same key direction.

metadata.review_notes: Photographer-verified: B&W reduces some chroma cues but shadow geometry is reliable. Loop/rembrandt boundary is one of the most common real-world ambiguities (cheek shadow extent / nose shadow continuation). NOT hybrid — single soft key.
